number;\n  exp: number;        // expires (7 days)\n}\n\n// Row Level Security\npolicies: {\n  \"users can only read own data\":\n    auth.uid() = user_id,\n  \"admins can read all\":\n    auth.jwt()->>'role' = 'admin'\n}"}]}]}]]}]]}]
